creator: wosch@cs.tu-berlin.de
text:
James Raynard <fports@jraynard.demon.co.uk> writes:
> PS For what it's worth, I think --enable-hidden-host should be disabled
> by default (perhaps set by an option?) for consistency with all the
> other MTUs in ports, if my memory serves correctly.  It took me quite
> a while to realise I was sending out mail with an invalid 'From' address...

Agreed, I had the same problem. --enable-hidden-host is a
dangerous option.

-- 
Wolfram Schneider   <wosch@apfel.de>   http://www.apfel.de/~wosch/
